name: rORE Stats Dashboard 2.0
goals: Current round stats (number, prize, entries, end time)
Clean, responsive UI with dark mode

statusHistory.note: Archived old dashboards (rore-stats, rore-stats-v2-rebuild, rore-stats-v3). Fresh workspace created.

Supabase schema & migrations completed by Codex agent (neat-sable). Migration includes tables (rounds, price_history, sync_metadata), RLS, helper function, and latest_stats view. TypeScript types aligned. Sync scripts skeleton created. Supabase README added. Next: user must create Supabase project, run migration, add env credentials, then test sync jobs.
Ran sync-prices.ts (prices inserted) and sync-rounds.ts (20 rounds backfilled). Database now has ~40 rounds and 2 price records. API data pipeline verified.

Frontend pages created: app/page.tsx (dashboard with price charts, stats cards, motherlode), app/history/page.tsx (round history table with pagination). Components: PriceChart, MotherlodeChart, RoundTable. Dark mode support via Tailwind. Ready for review and deployment.

Decision: Overwrite existing implementation to match PRD v3 spec exactly. PRD migration SQL already written (supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql) but not yet applied. This will drop current tables and recreate fresh schema with tables: rounds, prices, protocol_stats, sync_log. Next: apply migration, add CRON_SECRET, build backfill script, update frontend to PRD spec (rORE theme, Recharts donut/bar/line with motherlode calc), configure vercel.json crons.
Full historical backfill completed successfully: 31,639 rounds inserted, latestRoundId 32641. Data pipeline verified and ready for frontend integration.

skmd dropped rounds table (CASCADE — also dropped latest_stats view) and reran migrations/001_initial_schema.sql via Supabase SQL editor, recreating schema with PRD columns (round_id, block_number, winner_take_all, motherlode_hit, motherlode_value, motherlode_running, etc.). Subagent rewrote types/supabase.ts and scripts/sync-rounds.ts to map API fields to new columns and compute motherlode_running cumulatively. Full backfill ran: 32,639 rounds inserted (latest round_id 32,641, 327 pages). Built locally and deployed to Vercel: https://rore-stats-v2-rebuild.vercel.app

Applied rORE.supply theme: updated globals.css with dark gradient, accent colors; replaced all Burncoin references in docs with rORE. Build passes, committed and pushed. Deploy blocked by Vercel Hobby cron limits (*/5 min schedule).

Identified critical P0 blockers from FIX_TASKLIST.md. Spawned subagent (fix-api-p0) to implement P0-1/P0-2/P0-3 and P1-1/P1-2/P1-4. Goal: resolve API 500 errors and upgrade charts to react-chartjs-2 with zoom. Monitoring subagent progress.

Forced redeploy to Vercel (vercel --prod --force) resolved module load error. API endpoints now healthy: /api/stats and /api/rounds return 200; /api/prices returns 404 due to empty prices table (awaiting sync). Pending: set CRON_SECRET in Vercel env and GitHub secrets to enable automated sync endpoints (/api/sync/prices, /api/sync/rounds). Secondary tasks (Discord FAQ, Social Media, Onboarding) remain.

Identified auth header mismatch in GitHub Actions workflow (used x-cron-secret instead of Authorization: Bearer). Updated .github/workflows/sync.yml to use correct header. CRON_SECRET present in Vercel project env (pre-existing). Manually triggered workflow: both Sync prices and Sync rounds succeeded. Prices table now contains latest data (ORE $0.09409, WETH $2074.19). Dashboard live at https://rore-stats-v2-rebuild.vercel.app displays live prices and round stats. Remaining: chart upgrades (react-chartjs-2, zoom), layout fixes, cleanup; secondary priorities.

Fixed GitHub Actions workflow: changed header from 'x-cron-secret' to 'Authorization: Bearer' to match endpoint auth. CRON_SECRET already set in Vercel env and GitHub repo secrets. Manually triggered workflow run succeeded: /api/sync/prices inserted latest price (ore: $0.09409, weth: $2074.19); /api/sync/rounds reported no new rounds (up-to-date). Prices table now populated; /api/prices returns live data. Dashboard is fully functional with live prices. Next: implement P1/P2 chart upgrades and cleanup per FIX_TASKLIST.md, then secondary priorities (Discord FAQ, Social Media, Onboarding).

Completed extensive research on AI agentic coding loops using GPT-5.4. Sources: FelixCraft Guide (Nat Eliason), Azure AI Agent Orchestration patterns, Latent.space TDD for AI agents, Git worktree isolation guides, error recovery/failure strategies. Synthesized best practices into BEST_PRACTICES.md and RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md. Created IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md for phased rollout: Phase 1 (worktree isolation, PRD test plans, structured logging, auto-validation, approval gates); Phase 2 (checkpointing, fallback cascade, evaluation suite); Phase 3 (metrics dashboard, weekly retros). Identified critical gaps: no isolation, missing validation, poor observability, no test plans. Plan ready for user approval before implementation.
Restarted buyback-rore agent. Spawned Codex subagent (p0-p1-fixes) to implement P0/P1 tasks. Updated daily memory.

Codex subagent (p0-p1-fixes) implemented critical P0 and P1 tasks: wired DB-backed data path, uncapped motherlode history, limited winner types to 1,044 rounds, replaced charts with react-chartjs-2, added zoom/pan, fixed layout order. Committed on branch task/p0-p1-complete (a6962fc). P1-3 theme colors remains blocked pending extraction from rore.supply. All API endpoints healthy. Ready for review, merge, and redeployment.

Codex subagent extracted rORE.supply brand palette and implemented theme across dashboard: updated tailwind.config.js with orange/amber color tokens (#ff6b00 primary, #ff3d00 secondary), created lib/theme.ts, updated globals.css with gradient backgrounds and glow effects, styled page.tsx components with new tokens, and themified Chart.js defaults. Build compiles successfully; all unit tests pass (10/10). P1-2 done.

summary:
rORE Stats Dashboard 2.0: Supabase layer complete with backfill of 32,639 rounds, live prices syncing via GitHub Actions, and Vercel deployment. Theme applied (rORE.supply). API endpoints healthy. P0+P1 fixes implemented (DB wiring, charts upgrade, layout, zoom). P1-2 theme colors completed with orange/amber palette matching rore.supply. Unit tests passing. Next: merge task/p0-p1-complete, redeploy, then tackle P1-3 (Burncoin text removal), P1-4 (header cleanup), P1-5 (DaisyUI strip), and secondary priorities (Discord FAQ, Social Media, Onboarding).

**Recent context (2025-03-12):** Discovered that API only shows motherlode value on hit rounds; the database's motherlode_running column is correctly computed by sync script (cumulative winners * 0.2, reset on hit) and is required for full history line chart. The previous Codex subagent failed to produce changes; will retry with isolated worktree and focused PRD including test plan.

**New documents created**:
- life/resources/ai-agent-coding-loops/BEST_PRACTICES.md
- life/resources/ai-agent-coding-loops/RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md
- life/resources/ai-agent-coding-loops/FELIXCRAFT_GUIDE.md
- life/projects/rore-stats-2.0/IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md
